calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Renita Mason. Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for Plaintiff.
Defendant Kimberly Edwards is present.
Attorney Deepa Varma representing the defendant through limited scope.

The parties meet and confer.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of NOV-21-2011 is vacated.
